## Summary
What does this change do, in plain terms?

## Motivation / Context
Why is this change needed?
What problem does it solve or prevent?

## Changes Made
- High-level list of changes
- Focus on behavior or policy, not file-by-file diffs

## Tests
- What tests were added or updated?
- How do they fail without this change?

## Risk / Impact
- What could this break?
- Any behavior changes downstream?

## Notes
Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
